sections.paragraph:
to waver, to totter. Psa 18:37 26:1 37:31 Job 12:5, מֹועֲדֵי רֶגֶל “whose foot tottereth.” Pro 25:19, רֶגֶל מוָּֽעדֶת “a tottering foot,” for מֹועֶדֶת, ֹו shortened into וּ, compare Lehrg. p. 309. Others take מוּעֶדֶת as an abstr. noun, a tottering, of the form סוּגַר, עוּגָב, in fem.

Hiphil, to cause to totter, or shake, Psa 69:24.
